user.title: Connect ScanservJS
user.description: Connect Home Assistant directly to your local ScanservJS instance.

data_description.name: Name used for this integration entry.
data_description.url: Local URL of ScanservJS, for example http://192.168.1.10:8080.
data_description.verify_ssl: Verify the certificate when using HTTPS.

error.no_devices: ScanservJS did not report a scanner.

init.title: Manage scan profiles
init.description: Add, edit, reorder or delete scan profiles.

add_profile.title: Add scan profile
add_profile.description: Choose a template. You can adjust all settings in the next step.

add_profile_data.title: Configure scan profile
add_profile_data.description: Configure the settings used when this profile button is pressed.

data_description.filename_prefix: When set, the integration renames the file to prefix_timestamp.extension.
data_description.file_action: Available actions are loaded directly from the ScanservJS context.

edit_profile_data.title: Edit scan profile
edit_profile_data.description: Change the settings of the selected scan profile.

data_description.filename_prefix: When set, the integration renames the file to prefix_timestamp.extension.
data_description.file_action: Available actions are loaded directly from the ScanservJS context.

delete_profile.title: Delete scan profile
delete_profile.description: The selected profile and its button will be removed.

error.profile_exists: A profile with this name already exists.
